Here is the list of astrological signs and their corresponding scores based on various aspects:
1. Aries - 7/10 - Natural-born leaders, but can be impulsive.
2. Taurus - 6.5/10 - Reliable and practical, but may be stubborn.
3. Gemini - 8/10 - Curious and adaptable, but may be unpredictable.
4. Cancer - 9/10 - Emotional and nurturing, but may be overly sensitive.
5. Leo - 7.5/10 - Confident and charismatic, but can be prideful.
6. Virgo - 8.5/10 - Analytical and hardworking, but may be perfectionistic.
7. Libra - 9.5/10 - Diplomatic and social, but may be indecisive.
8. Scorpio - 8.5/10 - Passionate and intense, but can be secretive.
9. Sagittarius - 9/10 - Adventurous and optimistic, but may be reckless.
10. Capricorn - 7/10 - Ambitious and responsible, but may be overly critical.
11. Aquarius - 8.5/10 - Humanitarian and independent, but may be rebellious.
12. Pisces - 9.5/10 - Empathetic and imaginative, but may be dreamy.
